title: Magical Dye
description:
Magical dye for dusts and mineral blocks.
April Fools special present
body:
- **简体中文**

Minecraft的染料向来只是单纯装饰作用，而这个数据包/模组解决了这个问题，如今，染料魔法让染料们彻底翻身！

现在，染料们可以改变粉末、矿物块的属性了！！！染料们已经开始原地打转了！

- **English**

Dyes in Minecraft have always been purely decorative, and this pack/mod solves that problem, and now, Dye Magic has turned the dyes inside out!

Dyes can now change the properties of powders, mineral blocks!!!! The dyes have begun to turn in place!

Now you can use dye to change dust and mineral blocks to differnet ones, such as iron block to gold block

Github
[https://github.com/whwdzg/Magical_Dye](https://github.com/whwdzg/Magical_Dye)
